Strategy Profile

This vault is managed by Yearn Finance on the Ethereum network. Capital supplied to this pool is matched with active prime borrowing markets, ensuring high utilization rate and direct interest payouts in USDC.

Asset Exposure: single
Security: Smart Contracts Audited by OpenZeppelin. 1:1 Redemption capability.
